intro: Pholidocarpus kingianus, commonly known as King's cycad, is a species of flowering plant in the family Podocarpaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its purported health benefits in reducing oxidative stress and promoting immune function. Bioactive constituents of Pholidocarpus kingianus include alkaloids, terpenoids, and flavonoids, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts that are used to treat a range of conditions, including coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
